title: Coruscant College of Law
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Coruscant College of Law''' was one of the [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] best schools of law. In the last years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Old Republic]], many of its alumni helped serve the Republic as negotiators and mediators. [[Barrister]] [[Doolb Snoil]] was a member.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]'' {{1st}}
*[[The Cestus Deception (abridged audiobook)|''The Cestus Deception'' abridged audiobook]]
